Title: DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH_DIFF
Feature: DB.DBA.RDF_GRAPH_DIFF(gfrom, gto, only_gfrom, only_gto, accuracy, fp_list, invfp_list, gfrom_rules, gto_rules, equiv_map, equiv_rev)
Description: performs the core operation of preparing graph diff.
Performs the core operation of preparing graph diff - matching between nodes of two graphs.

Typically is called from wrapper that returns the diff in an extended GUO ontology 
(http://webr3.org/owl/guo#) as a string output in TURTLE syntax.
